all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Rejoice greatly, O daughter of Zion; shout, O daughter of Jerusalem: behold, thy King cometh unto thee: he is just, and having salvation; lowly, and riding upon an ass, and upon a colt the foal of an ass.
Zechariah 9:9
Quote of the Day
"The greatness of our Saints in Africa becomes even more evident as they face life’s challenges and the demands of a growing Church."
Elder Carlos A. Godoy | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
